chat.previewNotAvailable: Preview not available (file data expires after page refresh)

settings.title: Settings
settings.temperatureDescription: Controls creativity. Low = focused, High = creative.
settings.topKDescription: Limits token selection to the top K most likely tokens. Low = more focused, High = more diverse.
settings.topPDescription: Cumulative probability threshold for token selection. Low = more predictable, High = more creative.
settings.securityWarningBody: Your API key will be encrypted and stored in this browser. The key will be sent via encrypted connection (HTTPS) to KodingBuddy server, then forwarded to your chosen AI provider.
settings.securityBullet1: Key is NOT stored on our server
settings.securityBullet2: Key is encrypted in browser before storage
settings.securityBullet3: Make sure you are on a secure network
settings.securityBullet4: Do not use on public/shared computers

models.selectDescription: Choose an AI model that fits your needs

errors.rateLimitDetail: Daily quota resets ~3-4 PM WIB (midnight Pacific Time)
errors.rateLimitSuggestion3: Use your own API key in Settings

about.title: About
about.description: AI Chatbot for learning programming and technology
about.openSource: This project is open-source to help anyone learn coding

welcome.tagline: Learning to code just got fun!
welcome.subtitle: Ask anything about programming and technology
welcome.suggestion2: Help me learn TypeScript from scratch
welcome.suggestion3: What's the difference between REST API and GraphQL?
